Custom Sintra Signs for Indoor & Outdoor Business Display

Durable 3mm & 6mm Plastic Sintra Sign Printing & Customization

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Choose Your Sintra Sign Thickness: • 3mm Sintra - Lightweight indoor display • 6mm Sintra - Heavy-duty indoor/outdoor use Select Your Size: Standard sizes available up to 32" x 48" Oversized options available up to 4' x 8' Choose Your Finishing: • Square Cut Standard • Custom Shape Cut (contact for quote) • Single or Double-Sided Printing PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Sintra Sign Material for Indoor & Outdoor Business Display

Sintra signs are printed on rigid 3mm or 6mm thick plastic material, perfect for professional business signage, promotional displays, and long-term advertising applications. The durable Sintra material can be router-cut to any custom shape and withstands both indoor and outdoor conditions.

Key Features:

  • Available in 3mm or 6mm thickness options
  • Full-color printing with full bleed edge coverage
  • Custom shape cutting available
  • Single or double-sided printing options
  • Maximum print size up to 4' x 8'
  • Suitable for indoor and outdoor use

Common Applications:

  • Business advertising signage
  • Presentation displays
  • Restaurant menus
  • Promotional cutouts
  • Trade show displays
  • Real estate signs

Size Options:

Standard sizes ship via UPS. Signs over 32" x 48" or where height + width exceeds 81 inches ship via freight. Maximum print size is 4' x 8'.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Sintra Sign Material for Professional Business Signage

Choose from two Sintra thickness options designed for different display requirements and durability needs.

3mm Sintra Material

  • Lightweight option ideal for indoor displays
  • Perfect for temporary promotions and presentations
  • Easy to mount and handle
  • Cost-effective for short-term applications

6mm Sintra Material

  • Heavy-duty option for long-term outdoor use
  • Enhanced durability for weather resistance
  • Professional appearance for permanent signage
  • Superior rigidity for large format displays

Material Properties

  • Rigid PVC foam core construction
  • Smooth surface for vibrant print quality
  • Router-cut capability for custom shapes
  • UV-resistant for outdoor applications
  • Lightweight yet durable structure
PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Sintra Sign Finishing Options for Professional Installation

Standard Square Cut

Clean, straight edges perfect for rectangular and square sign designs. Standard finishing option included with all orders.

Custom Shape Cutting

Router-cut custom shapes available for unique design requirements. Contact our customer service team to discuss your custom shape needs and receive a personalized quote.

Printing Options

  • Single-Sided Printing: Full-color printing on one side with white backing
  • Double-Sided Printing: Full-color printing on both sides for maximum visibility
  • Full Bleed Printing: Color extends to all edges for seamless appearance

Edge Finishing

  • Smooth, clean-cut edges
  • No additional edge banding required
  • Professional appearance ready for mounting
PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Sintra Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Choose from flexible production timeframes designed to meet your project deadlines. Production begins once artwork is approved and upload is complete.

2 Business Days Express Production

  • Fast turnaround for urgent projects
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day rush available in select cases
  • Contact customer service for rush order availability

3 Business Days Standard Production

  • Most popular production option
  • Balanced speed and value
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Reliable timeframe for most business needs

5 Business Days Saver Production

  • Cost-effective option for advance planning
  • Best value for non-urgent projects
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Reduced pricing for extended timeline

Production Notes

  • Turnaround begins when file upload is complete
  • Proof requests pause production until approval
  • Total delivery time includes production plus shipping
  • Prepress review may extend timeline if artwork requires adjustment
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Sintra Sign Payment & Ordering Process

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Business checks (must clear before production)
  • Secure online payment processing
  • Payment required before production begins

Payment Processing

  • Credit cards charged only after order approval
  • Check payments must be received before production
  • No payment processing until artwork is approved
  • Secure payment handling for all transactions

Order Approval Process

  • Review artwork and specifications before payment
  • Request order proof for verification if needed
  • Approve final details before production begins
  • Customer service available for payment questions

Shipping Options for Custom Sintra Sign Delivery

Standard Shipping Methods

  • UPS Ground shipping for standard sizes
  • 1-3 day ground delivery to 90% of United States
  • Tracking number provided when shipped
  • Shipping cost based on weight and destination

Oversized Shipping Requirements

  • Signs over 32" x 48" ship via freight
  • Signs where height + width exceeds 81" require freight
  • Additional charges apply for large format orders
  • Contact customer service for oversized shipping quotes

Shipping Protection Policy

  • Damaged goods must be returned for replacement
  • Lost packages replaced after carrier confirmation
  • 7-10 business days for lost package processing
  • Natural disaster delays not eligible for refunds

International Shipping

  • Worldwide shipping available
  • International rates vary by destination
  • Contact customer service for international quotes
  • Additional customs documentation required
PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Indoor & Outdoor Business Uses for Custom Sintra Signs

Business & Commercial Applications

  • Storefront advertising and promotional displays
  • Office building directory and wayfinding signs
  • Restaurant menu boards and specials displays
  • Retail point-of-purchase advertising
  • Professional service announcements

Event & Trade Show Displays

  • Trade show booth signage and backdrops
  • Conference presentation displays
  • Event sponsor recognition boards
  • Product showcase and feature displays
  • Directional signage for large venues

Real Estate & Property Management

  • Property for sale and lease signs
  • Development project announcements
  • Property management contact displays
  • Open house directional signage

Outdoor Advertising Applications

  • Construction site project signs
  • Parking lot and facility directions
  • Weather-resistant promotional displays
  • Long-term outdoor advertising campaigns

Specialized Applications

  • Custom-shaped promotional cutouts
  • Educational and instructional displays
  • Safety and compliance signage
  • Decorative architectural elements
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Sintra Sign Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Preferred File Formats

  • Vector Files: .eps files with fonts converted to outlines (best quality)
  • High-Resolution PDF: Print-ready files with embedded fonts
  • High-Resolution JPEG: Minimum 300 DPI at actual print size
  • Adobe Illustrator: .ai files with outlined fonts

Artwork Guidelines

  • Design at actual print size for best results
  • Include 0.125" bleed on all sides for full-bleed printing
  • Keep important text and elements 0.25" from edges
  • Use CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction
  • Embed or outline all fonts to prevent substitutions

Order Proof Options

  • Order Proof: Low-resolution preview with order summary
  • Color Match Proof: Physical proof for color-critical projects
  • Proof approval required before production begins
  • Contact customer service for color-critical projects

Design Assistance Available

  • Professional graphic design services available
  • File quality assessment and optimization
  • Design consultation for optimal results
  • Contact customer service for design support

File Upload Process

  • Upload files directly through online ordering system
  • Large files can be sent via customer service
  • Production begins once upload is complete
  • Prepress review ensures optimal print quality
PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Sintra Signs for Your Business Today

Ready to create professional signage that represents your business with quality and durability? Our custom Sintra signs combine superior materials with expert printing to deliver the professional appearance your brand deserves.

Three Simple Ways to Get Started

Option 1: Upload Your Print-Ready Design

  • Choose your Sintra sign size and thickness
  • Upload your artwork file through our secure system
  • Review and approve your order for production

Option 2: Let Our Design Team Help You

  • Select your preferred Sintra sign specifications
  • Upload your images, logos, or reference materials
  • Provide design instructions for our professional team
  • Review and approve the custom design before printing

Option 3: Request a Custom Quote

  • Contact our customer service team for specialized requirements
  • Discuss custom shapes, oversized options, or unique specifications
  • Receive personalized pricing and timeline information

Why Choose Our Sintra Sign Printing?

  • Premium 3mm and 6mm Sintra materials for lasting durability
  • Full-color printing with vibrant, professional results
  • Flexible production times from 2-5 business days
  • Custom shape cutting available for unique designs
  • Expert customer service and design support
  • Nationwide shipping with tracking and delivery confirmation

Start your custom Sintra sign project today and see the difference professional-grade materials and expert printing make for your business signage needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Sintra Signs

What are Sintra signs made of?

Sintra signs are made from rigid PVC foam core material available in 3mm or 6mm thickness. This lightweight yet durable plastic material provides excellent print quality and can be router-cut into custom shapes for unique design applications.

Can I order custom-shaped Sintra signs?

Yes, we offer custom shape cutting for Sintra signs using router-cutting technology. Contact our customer service team to discuss your specific shape requirements and receive a personalized quote for custom-cut Sintra signage.

Can Sintra signs be printed double-sided?

Absolutely! We offer both single-sided and double-sided printing options for Sintra signs. Double-sided printing provides maximum visibility and is perfect for signs that will be viewed from multiple directions.

What colors are used to print Sintra signs?

We use full-color CMYK digital printing to reproduce vibrant, accurate colors on Sintra signs. Our printing process can handle complex designs, photographs, gradients, and any color combination your design requires.

Are Sintra signs suitable for outdoor use?

Yes, Sintra signs are excellent for both indoor and outdoor applications. The material is UV-resistant and weather-durable, making it perfect for outdoor advertising, construction signs, real estate displays, and long-term promotional signage.

How should I store Sintra signs?

Store Sintra signs in a flat position in a cool, dry location away from direct sunlight when not in use. Avoid placing heavy objects on top of stored signs to prevent bending or surface damage.

What are common uses for custom Sintra signs?

Popular applications include business advertising, trade show displays, restaurant menus, real estate signs, construction site signage, promotional cutouts, office displays, and retail point-of-purchase advertising.

Can I request a proof before printing?

Yes, we offer order proofs that include a low-resolution preview of your artwork along with complete order details. For color-critical projects, we also provide a Color Match Proof System to ensure precise color reproduction.

What production times do you offer for Sintra signs?

We offer flexible production timeframes: 2 business days (Express), 3 business days (Standard), and 5 business days (Saver). Production begins once your artwork is approved and uploaded. Emergency same-day rushes may be available in select cases.

What's the maximum size for Sintra signs?

Our maximum print size is 4' x 8'. Signs over 32" x 48" or where height plus width exceeds 81 inches require freight shipping. Contact our team for oversized sign requirements and shipping information.
